# Portfolio

This section explores the technical mechanisms and applications of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), specifically focusing on the Copernicus Sentinel-1 mission.

::: column-page
```{r, echo=FALSE}
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(
  url = "https://jiaying-ice.github.io/Jiaying-2026-RS-Diary/index.html",
  ratio = "16:9"
)
```
:::

<p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 10px;">

<a href="https://jiaying-ice.github.io/Jiaying-2026-RS-Diary/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary"> Full Screen </a>

</p>
